response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio is a mix of Japanese and English commentary during Minecraft gameplay. The JSON reference indicates no vocal music, which is correct. 2. JSON Usage: Manual transcription was used to capture all verbal commentary and gameplay reactions. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to the vocal events of the speaker, segmenting the conversational dialogue cleanly.

subtitles.original: Oh! I heard it! The egg!
subtitles.english: Oh! I heard it! The egg!

subtitles.original: I'll be back, my dear chickens.
subtitles.english: I'll be back, my dear chickens.

subtitles.original: Ah, the slow life is amazing. I like this.
subtitles.english: Ah, the slow life is amazing. I like this.

subtitles.original: Time for the harvest after I put my fish in.
subtitles.english: Time for the harvest after I put my fish in.

subtitles.original: Am I getting more money per harvest? I should, cause I have the special bee.
subtitles.english: Am I getting more money per harvest? I should, cause I have the special bee.

subtitles.original: I want to get like a legendary bee.
subtitles.english: I want to get like a legendary bee.

subtitles.original: Oh, I am getting a lot per harvest.
subtitles.english: Oh, I am getting a lot per harvest.

subtitles.original: The bees have special skills that you can breed.
subtitles.english: The bees have special skills that you can breed.

subtitles.original: Like for example, I have speed, jump boost, and a farming money boost level two.
subtitles.english: Like for example, I have speed, jump boost, and a farming money boost level two.

subtitles.original: I get a lot of farming money boosts, that means harvesting will just get me a lot of money.
subtitles.english: I get a lot of farming money boosts, that means harvesting will just get me a lot of money.

subtitles.original: Maybe I'll put these in here.
subtitles.english: Maybe I'll put these in here.

subtitles.original: The red one will be my fishing box.
subtitles.english: The red one will be my fishing box.

subtitles.original: Okay, we have pumpkin pie to sell...
subtitles.english: Okay, we have pumpkin pie to sell...

subtitles.original: This one should be done by the time we come... Oh.
subtitles.english: This one should be done by the time we come... Oh.

subtitles.original: This one grew faster than I thought.
subtitles.english: This one grew faster than I thought.

subtitles.original: Then we can check for more eggs. Ah, the cycle.
subtitles.english: Then we can check for more eggs. Ah, the cycle.
